     Regenerate with: uv run python tools/gen_references.py -->

# Conditions — Full Reference

Condition 是「判斷一件事是否成立」的宣告，用在 `Choice.requires` /
`Choice.forbids` / `Line.requires` / `Scene.requires` 等地方。

```yaml
{kind: <kind>, target: <id>, value: <number / string / list>, stat: <optional>}
```

簡寫字串 `"kind:target=value"`：

```yaml
"flag:met_heroine_1"            # = {kind: flag, target: met_heroine_1}
"affection_gte:heroine_1=25"    # = {kind: affection_gte, target: heroine_1, value: 25}
```

> 本檔由 `tools/gen_references.py` 從 capability manifest 自動產生,涵蓋
> **此次執行時 registry 內所有 kind**(含已載入的 plugin)。用
> `uv run python tools/gen_references.py --pack <pack>` 可納入該 pack 的
> plugin kinds。寫 plugin 的方法見 [plugins.md](plugins.md)。

---

## 引擎內建

### `achievement`

Achievement has been unlocked.

| 參數 | 型別 | 必填 | 預設 | 說明 |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `target` | `string` | 是 |  | achievement_id |

```yaml
- {kind: achievement, target: <string>}
```

### `affection_gte`

Character's affection (on stat) is >= value.

| 參數 | 型別 | 必填 | 預設 | 說明 |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `target` | `string` | 是 |  | character_id |
| `value` | `integer` | 是 |  | int |
| `stat` | `string` | — | `None` | str? (axis, default 'affection') |

```yaml
- {kind: affection_gte, target: <string>, value: <integer>}
```

### `affection_lt`

Character's affection (on stat) is < value.

| 參數 | 型別 | 必填 | 預設 | 說明 |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `target` | `string` | 是 |  | character_id |
| `value` | `integer` | 是 |  | int |
| `stat` | `string` | — | `None` | str? (axis, default 'affection') |

```yaml
- {kind: affection_lt, target: <string>, value: <integer>}
```

### `chapter_at_or_after`

Current chapter's order is >= the target chapter's order (the ordinal 'reached chapter N or later' gate).

| 參數 | 型別 | 必填 | 預設 | 說明 |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `target` | `string` | 是 |  | chapter_id (threshold by order) |

```yaml
- {kind: chapter_at_or_after, target: <string>}
```

### `cleared_ending`

An ending was reached in ANY prior playthrough (New Game+ clear data). For gating after-stories.

| 參數 | 型別 | 必填 | 預設 | 說明 |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `target` | `string` | 是 |  | ending_id |

```yaml
- {kind: cleared_ending, target: <string>}
```

### `cleared_route`

A route was cleared in ANY prior playthrough (New Game+ clear data). For gating after-stories.

| 參數 | 型別 | 必填 | 預設 | 說明 |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `target` | `string` | 是 |  | route_id |

```yaml
- {kind: cleared_route, target: <string>}
```

### `flag`

Flag is truthy.

| 參數 | 型別 | 必填 | 預設 | 說明 |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `target` | `string` | 是 |  | flag_name |

```yaml
- {kind: flag, target: <string>}
```

### `flag_eq`

Flag equals value.

| 參數 | 型別 | 必填 | 預設 | 說明 |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `target` | `string` | 是 |  | flag_name |
| `value` | `any` | — | `None` | any |

```yaml
- {kind: flag_eq, target: <string>}
```

### `has_item`

Player has the item (>= value, default 1).

| 參數 | 型別 | 必填 | 預設 | 說明 |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `target` | `string` | 是 |  | item_id |
| `value` | `integer` | — | `None` | int (count, default 1) |

```yaml
- {kind: has_item, target: <string>}
```

### `in_chapter`

Current chapter is one of the values in the list.

| 參數 | 型別 | 必填 | 預設 | 說明 |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `value` | `array[string] \| string` | 是 |  | list[str] \| str (chapter id or ids) |

```yaml
- {kind: in_chapter, value: <array[string] | string>}
```

### `not_flag`

Flag is falsy (or unset).

| 參數 | 型別 | 必填 | 預設 | 說明 |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `target` | `string` | 是 |  | flag_name |

```yaml
- {kind: not_flag, target: <string>}
```

### `objective_completed`

A specific objective on a quest is done.

| 參數 | 型別 | 必填 | 預設 | 說明 |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `target` | `string` | 是 |  | quest_id |
| `stat` | `string` | — | `None` | objective_id |

```yaml
- {kind: objective_completed, target: <string>}
```

### `quest_active`

Quest is currently active.

| 參數 | 型別 | 必填 | 預設 | 說明 |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `target` | `string` | 是 |  | quest_id |

```yaml
- {kind: quest_active, target: <string>}
```

### `quest_completed`

Quest has been completed.

| 參數 | 型別 | 必填 | 預設 | 說明 |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `target` | `string` | 是 |  | quest_id |

```yaml
- {kind: quest_completed, target: <string>}
```

### `resource_eq`

Resource value == value.

| 參數 | 型別 | 必填 | 預設 | 說明 |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `target` | `string` | 是 |  | resource_id |
| `value` | `integer` | — | `None` | int |

```yaml
- {kind: resource_eq, target: <string>}
```

### `resource_gte`

Resource value >= value.

| 參數 | 型別 | 必填 | 預設 | 說明 |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `target` | `string` | 是 |  | resource_id |
| `value` | `integer` | — | `None` | int |

```yaml
- {kind: resource_gte, target: <string>}
```

### `resource_lt`

Resource value < value.

| 參數 | 型別 | 必填 | 預設 | 說明 |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `target` | `string` | 是 |  | resource_id |
| `value` | `integer` | — | `None` | int |

```yaml
- {kind: resource_lt, target: <string>}
```

### `scene_played`

Scene has been played at least once.

| 參數 | 型別 | 必填 | 預設 | 說明 |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `target` | `string` | 是 |  | scene_id |

```yaml
- {kind: scene_played, target: <string>}
```

### `time_in`

Current time-of-day is one of the values in the list.

| 參數 | 型別 | 必填 | 預設 | 說明 |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `value` | `array[string] \| string` | 是 |  | list[str] (e.g. ['morning', 'noon']) |

```yaml
- {kind: time_in, value: <array[string] | string>}
```

### `visited`

Location has been visited at least once.

| 參數 | 型別 | 必填 | 預設 | 說明 |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `target` | `string` | 是 |  | location_id |

```yaml
- {kind: visited, target: <string>}
```
